News Capstone » Serializers

Serializers news_app.serializers

DRF serializers convert model instances to JSON for the REST API. Three serializers are used by news_app.api_views.

class PublisherSerializer(ModelSerializer)

Read-only serializer for the Publisher model. Exposes id and name fields. Used as a nested serializer inside ArticleSerializer.

Example output: {"id": 1, "name": "The Daily News"}

modelPublisher
fields["id", "name"]
class JournalistSerializer(ModelSerializer)

Read-only serializer for a journalist (CustomUser). Exposes only id and username — personal details such as email are intentionally excluded from the public API.

Example output: {"id": 3, "username": "jane_writes"}

class ArticleSerializer(ModelSerializer)

Full read-only serializer for the Article model. Embeds nested PublisherSerializer and JournalistSerializer so API consumers receive complete context without additional requests.

fieldsid, title, content, publisher (nested), author (nested), is_approved, created_at, approved_at

Built with Sphinx 8.1.3 using the Read the Docs theme. News Capstone 1.0.0.
